Socials

Socials

The club beyond training.

Social events are a major part of Sheffield Triathlon life.

Open Instagram Join the Club

Community

Training is easier when people know your name.

Socials help new members settle in, keep training fun and make the club feel like a student community rather than just a timetable.

S Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
